overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player traverses elevated walkways, enclosed corridors with massive digital billboards, and open plazas beneath towering skyscrapers with reflective wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway between futuristic towers

events.description: passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an elevated walkway surrounded by towering skyscrapers with bright digital billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large angular orange metallic structure forming part of the elevated walkway architecture
skyscraper with illuminated windows rising into the night sky
massive vertical digital screen displaying bright white light on building facade
tropical tree situated between buildings adding greenery to the urban environment

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated concrete walkway at night, surrounded by futuristic skyscrapers with massive illuminated billboards. The camera passes a pedestrian in a white jacket while approaching a distinctive orange geometric structure on the left, with a palm tree visible ahead against the backdrop of glass towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed corridor with digital advertising walls

events.description: entering enclosed corridor with metal paneled walls and overhead industrial structures

agents.ego_description: proceeding through a narrow enclosed walkway with metal walls and digital screens on the right

entered.detail: industrial metal siding covering the right wall of the corridor
massive curved digital display showing pink and red neon graphics and advertisements
scattered trash and debris accumulated along the walkway edges
exposed beams and industrial infrastructure visible on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow enclosed corridor with industrial metal walls on the right featuring massive digital screens displaying vibrant pink neon advertisements. The walkway is littered with debris, and the camera moves through this confined space with no other pedestrians visible, creating a sense of urban decay beneath the glittering city above.

scene_state.functional_zone: street level with parked vehicles and advertising kiosks

events.description: exiting enclosed corridor onto street level with parked sports car and digital kiosk

agents.ego_description: emerging onto street level and turning right along a building facade, passing a parked green sports car

entered.detail: sleek green sports car parked on the sidewalk with its door slightly open
tall vertical digital display showing advertisements with green neon trim
modern building facade with horizontal white paneling and ventilation grates

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the enclosed corridor onto a street-level plaza, revealing a green sports car parked beside a glowing digital advertising kiosk. The environment opens up slightly as the camera turns right along a white-paneled building wall, transitioning from the confined corridor to the broader urban streetscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath overpass with fluorescent lighting

events.description: entering covered area beneath large concrete overpass with blue fluorescent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking under a massive concrete overpass with blue fluorescent lights while pedestrians appear ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: massive concrete highway or transit overpass creating a ceiling over the walkway
rows of bright blue fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the overpass ceiling
distant purple and pink neon signs visible through the underpass exit

segments.scene_description: The camera moves beneath a massive concrete overpass illuminated by striking blue fluorescent lights, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere. The white-paneled building now appears on the left as the camera progresses through this covered walkway, with pedestrians visible ahead and distant purple neon glow marking the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with graffiti walls

events.description: transitioning from blue fluorescent overpass lighting to warm orange covered walkway lighting

agents.ego_description: navigating through a covered walkway with orange ambient lighting, passing multiple pedestrians and graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in hooded jacket with glowing mask walking toward the camera

entered.detail: solid ceiling structure enclosing the walkway with embedded lighting fixtures
angular architectural element with warm orange lighting creating ambient glow
concrete wall covered in colorful street art and tags including 'PUNK' lettering
red and white striped construction barriers lining the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a fully covered walkway bathed in warm orange light from an angular canopy structure on the left. The walls feature prominent graffiti art including 'PUNK' tags, while concrete barriers guide pedestrian traffic. Several pedestrians navigate this enclosed space, including one with a glowing face mask approaching from the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with dense neon signage

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open plaza with dense cluster of neon signs and billboards

agents.ego_description: emerging into a vibrant open plaza filled with neon signage, walking past construction barriers toward the illuminated city center

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark suit walking across the plaza toward the neon-lit buildings

entered.detail: wide open pedestrian plaza with tiled ground surface and clear sightlines to surrounding towers
dense collection of bright neon signs and digital billboards in multiple colors lighting up the district

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a expansive urban plaza bathed in the glow of dense neon signage and towering digital billboards. The camera moves through this vibrant cyberpunk cityscape, passing construction barriers while pedestrians navigate the open space. The environment transitions from the enclosed orange-lit walkway to this dazzling open area filled with multicolored neon advertisements and futuristic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic city, transitioning from elevated walkways and claustrophobic industrial corridors into a sprawling, neon-drenched urban plaza. It begins on an elevated concrete path among towering skyscrapers and illuminated billboards, passing a pedestrian and an orange geometric structure before narrowing into a confined corridor of metal walls and vibrant pink digital advertisements. As the camera exits this decaying passage, the environment opens onto a street-level plaza featuring a green sports car and a glowing kiosk, then shifts beneath a massive concrete overpass bathed in striking blue fluorescent light. The scene then moves through a covered walkway defined by warm orange canopy lighting and graffiti-covered walls, where pedestrians with glowing masks navigate concrete barriers. Finally, the path expands into a vast, dazzling plaza filled with multicolored neon signage and towering digital billboards that dominate the futuristic skyline.
